chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Misc. Application No.S-474 of 2024 DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE Hearing of case. 1. For orders on office objection at flag “A” 2. For hearing of main case 3. For hearing of M.A No.4004/24 27-02-2025 Mr. Zaheer Ahmed Ujjan, Advocate for applicant Mr. Khalil Ahmed Maitlo, DPG ******** Applicant Abdul Jabbar along with his counsel is present; however, the respondent No.3 is continuously not attending the Court. Learned counsel for the applicant submits that the matter pertains to civil dispute over one quarter of F.F.C which has been allotted to the applicant, he produced original utility bills which apparently shows his entitlement over the subject quarter of F.F.C. He further submits that the respondent No.3 in order to create hurdle and pressurizing him for vacating such quarter though the matter is of civil nature and does not sustainable under the law of criminal remedy. Learned counsel submits that the respondent No.3 has sought the impugned order for lodging of FIR but still such FIR has not been registered mere to pressurize the applicant for ill motive. In view of above, impugned order dated 23-08-2024 is set aside and the instant application is allowed. Judge Naveed
